info.name: KSR Fruits API Tests
info.description: Comprehensive API testing collection for KSR Fruits application — covers all 4 microservices with happy path, error, and security tests

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Test User",
  "email": "testuser@example.com",
  "address": "123 Test Street, Test City",
  "receiverName": "Test Receiver",
  "receiverMobile": "9999999999"
}

item.name: Admin - List Users (with user token - should fail)

exec: pm.test("Status 403 when user accesses admin endpoint", () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test("Each product has id, name, price", () => {

item.name: Admin - Create Product (no auth - should fail)

exec: pm.test("Status 400 when UTR missing for online payment", () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test("Status 400 for invalid status value", () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));

item.name: Admin - Get All Orders (with user token - should fail)

exec: pm.test("Status 403 when user accesses admin orders", () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test("Status 400 for quantity below minimum", () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
